transcript.text:
[Mukbanger Tzuyang is here]
[Wake up]
[Let's serve]
[Dangjin Clams]
[Kalguksu (handmade noodles)]
Crazy X3
Hello everyone
I have a schedule tomorrow at Dangjin so I'm here a day prior
There are a lot of clam restaurants here since it's the seaside
I've been craving some clams, so I came to eat some
Let's get some
I'm hungry
[Chunghae Seafood House]
Alone
Alone?
Grilled clams by yourself?

There's a combo set for 2
For 2? How about this one?
4 person combo set?
You look like that mukbanger
Do you know me?
Really?
Do you know my name?
I'll think about it
Did you find it?
I watch you every day
Really?
How many does the large size serve?
About 5 people
Give me 2 of those
2 large?!
2 Sikhye too (Rice drink)

2 large sizes coming up
For mukbanger Tzuyang
[Stacks on stacks]
Amazing
So big
This is all going with the sauce Is that so?
The scallop is alive
It's breathing
Put this here and cut it up later
Just like that?
Cut it up in bite sizes
It's ready when it turns white
Thank you
This one seems ready It's dried up
That's amazing
Let's put the others on the grill

Let's hurry
It's burnt
It burns so quickly
Gotta flip it right away
So good
It cooks right away
Grilled clam is delicious every season
It's hot
It melts in my mouth
What is this? The red stuff tastes good
This one seems ready
Looks at the orange guts
Looks so good I want to dig in
When will I get through all of this though?
I wish they came out cooked
There's been thunder today And the sky was red

Bloody red
Post that photo I took of the sky
Perfect weather to eat clams
This one is good to go
Wrap it with cheese
This is a perfect time to eat
So tender If you cook it too much, it's going to get chewy
[Bye shell]
Such a good day to eat clams
Conch next to it too
So tender
Even in the Summer
The kimchi pancake needs to be eaten when it's warm
So good
Even better when it's fresh out of the pan
None of these are cooked yet

Glass noodles?
The sauce is like Tteokboki sauce (spicy rice cake)
Just like Tteokboki with glass noodles
This seems ready
So big
Dip it
Looks like a pincer meat
So good
This one seems ready
Put 1 on the grill
This is so good Very chewy
Full of juice
Am I dumb?
Aren't you supposed to wear the glove on your non-dominant hand?
I did it the opposite way
Just like this.. Oh no!

It opened up This needs to be filmed
[I'll pay attention]
Not perfect, but still good
Yummy
Just like a scallop tteokboki
It's my first time eating clams in hot weather
It tastes good
This is the best part
Gather all the clams here And eat them at once
Let's dig in before it gets cold
I've had lots of clams and I've realized that
I can't tell them apart
They all look the same
I don't need any dipping sauce
It's perfectly seasoned
It's taking so long to cook

It's good when it's eaten as a whole? I like that
Conch
Amazing
It's cooking now
It's cooking now that you're here
They're scared of me
They're not scared of me
They are all opening up now that she's here
I was struggling for a long time
It's so fresh Do you see it steaming?
Amazing
I got this from here Thank you
I'll finish this up for you
Thank you
[Let me take that out of the way]
No, it has to be seen

[It needs to be seen for mukbang]
Jackknife clam?
You guys have this too?
Jackknife clams! Thank you
They're big
That looks so good They taste good
Aren't you giving too much on the house?
Just give us your autograph I got you guys
That looks so good
It's filled
Some mozzarella cheese
No other sauce is needed It's perfectly seasoned
This is the jackknife clam
It's sweet
Very sweet
It's so good with this

I'm just speechless
This is crazy
[She is crazy]
I've been throwing away the meat
So stupid
It took so much effort
Cooked jackknife clam
How good will it be?
Very sweet
The only bad thing about this is that clams don't fill you up
No matter how much you eat
This is like a clam soup
Cute
Pour the juice in here
This is the truth You can mix rice in here
The reason why I'm not cooking more is that it takes too long to cook

And we don't have much time here
The producer does not look satisfied, so
We'll share the rest of the food together after we film
He's smiling now
I have to show the noodles though
Excuse me, do you have kalguksu?
1 of that, please
Thank you
Can't wait for the kalguksu
I'm so hungry
A couple more
Thank you
So pretty
Thank you
Yum
Wow, how many servings is this?

Is this for 1 person?
The cameraman looked hungry So we brought more
The producer?
Was it obvious?
I wasn't the only one that noticed
They prepared 2 bowls
Potatoes, clams, etc
It's hot
Tasty
Non-fermented kimchi
If just the noodles taste this good, that means the soup is amazing
[Of course]
Amazing Thick and savory
[Heavenly]
So good
There are jackknife clams in here That's why it's so good

All I can say is "delicious" when it actually is
No explanations are needed
[Finished]
I will end it here and finish the rest together
I've always had scallops in the wintertime
But eating it in the hot weather was nice Sweating it out
I think it's great in every season
Thanks everyone
Let that man eat now
Poor guy
[Tzuyang ate most of it] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
